title: LogEntry
description: A projected log entry from the audit event bus or diagnostic stream (spec 019).

id.description: Stable prefixed id. aud:<n> for audit-sourced entries; dia:<n> for diagnostic entries.

contractVersion.description: Schema version of this LogEntry shape (H1).

time.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp at server-side emission.

source.description: Emitter tag. Closed enum aligned to spec 002 event-bus topic prefixes.

requestId.description: Operation id. Required for workflow events; optional for diagnostics.

entityType.description: Referenced entity kind. Omitted for diagnostics.

entityId.description: Stable id of the referenced entity. Present when entityType is present.
